name: Phase 1: Validate index.html on save
description: When the web UI template is saved, verify the confirmation gate, state management, and result feedback are all intact.

action.message:
The file phase-1-agentic-navigation-planner/templates/index.html was just saved. Please review it and verify:
1. The plan panel (#planBox) is hidden by default (display:none) and only shown after a successful /api/plan response.
2. The Execute button (#execute) is only clickable after a plan is loaded — it must be guarded by 'if (!currentPlan) return'.
3. The Plan button (#getPlan) is disabled during the /api/plan fetch and re-enabled after.
4. The Execute button (#execute) is disabled during the /api/execute fetch and re-enabled after.
5. The Cancel button clears currentPlan, hides #planBox, and hides the result box.
6. Chat history is cleared on each new Plan request before adding new bubbles.
7. The result box has three CSS states: loading (blue), success (green), error (red).
8. Static assets reference /assets/strands-logo.png and /assets/deepracer-logo.png.
9. The layout uses a two-column grid that collapses to single column at max-width: 768px.
Report any violations found.
